description_long: This bungalow consists of two distinct residential structures set within landscaped plots, each featuring manicured lawns, trees, and paved driveways. The main building has a modern, boxy design with large windows, a flat roof, and a garage, while the secondary structure is a two-story house with a gable roof, symmetrical window arrangement, and a small front porch. The property includes several mature trees, a parked car, and a paved area for additional parking or outdoor activities. The landscaping is well-maintained, with shrubs and hedges lining the perimeter and walkways connecting the entrances. The color palette is primarily neutral, with white and gray exteriors accented by green lawns and brown roofing. The overall setting suggests a suburban neighborhood with a focus on comfort, privacy, and curb appeal.
description: A modern bungalow property with two residential buildings, landscaped lawns, trees, and paved driveways. Features include large windows, a flat-roofed main house, a gabled secondary house, and a small front porch.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and side of both buildings, highlighting the landscaped lawns, trees, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a perspective from the rear and side, revealing the backyard, paved areas, and the arrangement of trees and car parking.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the front facade of the secondary house with its symmetrical windows and porch, as well as the rear of the main building.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the back and side of the main building, the open lawn, and the driveway with visible parking spaces and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
